chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1859 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7014/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.12.2024 None present for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Shahid Ahmed Abro, Controller of Examinations, SPSC >>>>>..<<<<< As per title of the petition, the petitioner has his residence at House No.A-734 Sector-4, Maymar Bungalows Ahsanabad Near Jama-tur-Rasheed Masjid Scheme-33, District Malir Karachi. Per circular of this Court territorial jurisdiction for District Malir Karachi lies with Principal Seat of this Court. Accordingly, the instant petition is disposed of for want of territorial jurisdiction. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the concerned Court having territorial jurisdiction by filing a fresh petition, if so advised. Office to communicate copy of this order to the petitioner as well his Counsel on their addresses mentioned in the title of petition and vakalatnama through courier service for information. Judge Judge ARBROHI
